page_content:
Our Vision

We envision a school that serves as a national model for collaboration, innovation, and entrepreneurship in the performing arts. The undergraduate curriculum, which leads toward a B.A. degree in Dance, offers students a solid foundation in the core areas of the discipline as well as insights into cross-disciplinary ﬁelds of study. Coursework is designed to help students become skillful, articulate, and expressive movers; to enable students to ﬁnd their own voice as creative artists, develop the ability to work effectively in a collaborative environment,

Dance Major 1

and to grow in their conceptual understanding of dance as an art form in relation to the other arts.
